turns.question: It'll be just a few minutes, is that okay?
turns.answer: Sure, no problem, I'll wait over there.

turns.question: Can I call your name when it's ready?
turns.answer: Yes, that works, thank you.

turns.question: Would you like to wait at the counter or a table?
turns.answer: I'll just wait at the counter, thanks.

turns.question: It's coming right up, thanks for your patience.
turns.answer: No worries, take your time.

turns.question: Can you check if this drink is mine?
turns.answer: Let me check the name real quick.

turns.question: Is this the caramel macchiato for Sarah?
turns.answer: Yes, that's me, thank you.

turns.question: Sorry for the wait, we're a bit backed up.
turns.answer: It's totally fine, I'm not in a rush.

turns.question: Can you double-check the name on this cup?
turns.answer: Sure, it says Michael, is that you?

turns.question: Your drink should be ready any moment now.
turns.answer: Great, thank you for the update.

turns.question: Is this the grande iced latte for Kevin?
turns.answer: Yes, that's mine, thank you.

turns.question: Would you like an update on your order status?
turns.answer: Sure, that would be helpful, thanks.

turns.question: Can you confirm this order is correct?
turns.answer: Let me check -- yes, this looks right.

turns.question: It looks like your order's almost done.
turns.answer: Perfect, I'll wait just a bit longer.

turns.question: Is this the mobile order under Jessica?
turns.answer: Yes, that's me, thank you.

turns.question: Sorry, we're just finishing up your drink now.
turns.answer: No worries at all, thanks for letting me know.

turns.question: Can you check if my order came in yet?
turns.answer: Let me check the screen real quick.

turns.question: Your order number is forty-two, does that sound right?
turns.answer: Yes, that's the one, thank you.

turns.question: Would you like me to remake that for you?
turns.answer: Yes, please, that would be great.

turns.question: Is this the tall cold brew for David?
turns.answer: Yes, that's mine, thanks so much.

turns.question: Your food will be out in just a second.
turns.answer: Perfect, thank you for letting me know.

turns.question: Can I get you anything while you wait?
turns.answer: No, I'm all set, thank you.

turns.question: Is the order under the name Ashley ready?
turns.answer: Yes, it's right here, thank you.

turns.question: Sorry about the delay, thanks for waiting.
turns.answer: No problem at all, I appreciate it.

turns.question: Can you confirm this is your correct drink?
turns.answer: Yes, this is exactly what I ordered.

turns.question: It's just brewing now, shouldn't be long.
turns.answer: No rush, I'll just wait right here.

turns.question: Is this the venti Frappuccino for Chris?
turns.answer: Yes, that's me, thank you.

turns.question: Would you like a fresh one instead of this?
turns.answer: Yes, please, that would be appreciated.

turns.question: Your order's up, sorry for the short wait.
turns.answer: No problem at all, thanks for the coffee.

turns.question: Can you check the label on this cup?
turns.answer: Sure, it says Rebecca, that's me.

turns.question: Is this the hot chocolate for Emily?
turns.answer: Yes, that's mine, thank you so much.

turns.question: We're just steaming the milk now, one moment.
turns.answer: Take your time, I'm not in a hurry.

turns.question: Can I get your order number to check on it?
turns.answer: Sure, it's number seventeen.

turns.question: Is this the oat milk latte for Justin?
turns.answer: Yes, that's me, thanks a lot.

turns.question: Your order's next up on the bar.
turns.answer: Great, thank you for the heads up.

turns.question: Can you confirm the size is correct?
turns.answer: Yes, this is the right size, thank you.

turns.question: It looks like there was a small mix-up, one second.
turns.answer: No worries at all, take your time fixing it.

turns.question: Is this the drip coffee for Anthony?
turns.answer: Yes, that's mine, thank you.

turns.question: Sorry, we're just plating your food now.
turns.answer: That's totally fine, I appreciate it.

turns.question: Can I double-check this is decaf like you asked?
turns.answer: Yes, please, that would be great.

turns.question: Your drink is finally ready, thanks for waiting.
turns.answer: Thank you so much, have a great day.
